zh.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Morse於1553年9月14日出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德時，他的父親Thomas Morse34歲，母親Agnes Hurland32歲。他於1571年與Joan Downes在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1603年6月30日在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年49歲，埋葬在英國艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Morse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Morris  .
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames, especially   Moses  . Compare   Morris  .
History: Samuel Morse (1791–1872), inventor of the electric telegraph andof Morse code, was a direct descendant of Anthony Morse of Wiltshire,England, who had emigrated to MA in 1635.

variants.name: Morss
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and London): variant of   Morse  .

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Morse was born on 14 September 1553, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Morse, was 34 and his mother, Agnes Hurland, was 32. He married Joan Downes in 1571, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 30 June 1603, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England.

Il a épousé Joan Downes en 1571, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1603, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre.

ko.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Morse(이)가 1553년 9월 14일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Morse(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Hurland(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1571년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Joan Downes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1603년 6월 30일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Morse nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1553, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Morse, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hurland, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Downes em 1571, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.Stoke By Nayland, Suffolk, England: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Morse родился 14 сентября 1553 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Morse было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hurland, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Downes в 1571 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 30 июня 1603 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия.
